description: Fixed integer seeds for the safe-agent study (pre-reg §6/§7). Each seed selects the per-run input data (passed to infra/gen_messy_orders.py --seed) so that, for a given seed, every arm faces byte-identical input. Seeds are published with results. The pilot used the first 10 seeds/arm/task (pre-reg §6 stage 2). Per pre-reg §6 stage 3 there is NO upper cap: the power analysis may append additional seeds to tighten the CI; appended seeds get a new lock version and are never removed/renumbered. Version 1.1.0-power appends 2 seeds (16180, 14142) after the original 10, taking the confirmatory sweep to 12 seeds × 22 tasks = 264 cells/arm to power the A–B contrast (see DEVIATIONS D-SEEDS-POWER, 2026-06-29).

provenance.42: the E3 / pilot reference seed (reproduces D2=246, D7=275, D8=250/$49,778.06)
provenance._note: seed 42 is included first so every sweep re-derives the registered E3 oracle numbers as a built-in regression check on the data generator.
provenance.16180: appended in v1.1.0-power (golden-ratio digits, phi ~ 1.6180) per pre-reg §6 stage 3 to tighten the A–B CI; see DEVIATIONS D-SEEDS-POWER (2026-06-29).
provenance.14142: appended in v1.1.0-power (sqrt(2) ~ 1.4142 digits) per pre-reg §6 stage 3 to tighten the A–B CI; see DEVIATIONS D-SEEDS-POWER (2026-06-29).
